objective: Fix ctc_ input-id variant on dev: fc_ ids rejected where ctc_ expected. Comprehensive id-sanitization for all item types in OpenAI passthrough adapter.

workPhases.title: Fix bridge.ts id prefixes + extend passthrough sanitizer + regression tests

tasks.title: bridge.ts: mint ctc_ for custom_tool_call items (streaming + non-streaming)
Extend stripInvalidMessageIds to type-aware sanitizer covering all item types
Regression tests: custom_tool_call with ctc_ prefix, passthrough strips fc_ on custom_tool_call
Full bun test + push dev + CI green

criteria.scenario: bridge generates correct prefixes per item type
criteria.expectedEvidence: bridge.ts diff showing ctc_ for custom_tool_call; bridge tests pass
criteria.capturedEvidence: d456ea62 (Carver) + da236d0d (direct): bridge.ts now mints ctc_ for custom_tool_call, tsc_ for tool_search_call, ws_ for web_search_call; fc_ stays for function_call only. Streaming + non-streaming paths both fixed. Bridge tests verify ws_ prefix consistency.

criteria.scenario: passthrough adapter sanitizes all item type ids, not just messages
criteria.expectedEvidence: openai-responses.ts type-aware id validation; passthrough tests with mixed item types
criteria.capturedEvidence: stripInvalidItemIds in openai-responses.ts covers 6 verified types: msg_, rs_, fc_, ctc_, tsc_, ws_. Table-driven passthrough tests for valid preservation + invalid stripping. codex-rs exploration confirmed full prefix map from session/mod.rs:2801.

criteria.scenario: dev pushed with CI green, ff baseline preserved
criteria.expectedEvidence: gh run success on dev; git merge-base --is-ancestor main dev
criteria.capturedEvidence: da236d0d pushed to origin/dev; Cross-platform CI completed success; git merge-base --is-ancestor main dev OK. d456ea62 had Windows-only timeout flake (unrelated); da236d0d passed all platforms.
